title: OAP Queries
description: Schema for the query discovery and execution capability (io.oap.agents.queries).

queryCatalogueEntry.description: An entry in the query catalogue — one available query type with its schema name, version, and dataschema URI.

schema.description: Query schema name in kebab-case (e.g. list-brokers, list-alerts). Used as the {schema} path segment in GET /queries/{schema}.

version.description: Schema version string (e.g. 1.0, 2.1). Used as the {version} path segment in GET /queries/{schema}/{version}.

dataschema.description: Resolvable URI to the JSON Schema document for this query, at GET /queries/{schema}/{version}.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this query returns.

queryCatalogue.description: Response body for GET /queries. Lists all query types this service supports.

querySchemaDocument.description: Response body for GET /queries/{schema}/{version}. Describes the parameters accepted and the response shape for a specific query.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the query returns.

parameters.description: JSON Schema for accepted query string parameters. Omit if the query takes no parameters.

response.description: JSON Schema for the query response body.
